commit: feat: add Light / Dark / System appearance selector (#1599)
notes: Ignored. Grain has a highly custom, split-theme architecture via ThemeContext.tsx (allowing dark Quick Panel with light Settings). Upstream's implementation is a global document.documentElement override, which is incompatible with Grain's per-panel toggles.
